notes: Used in music, writing, and speech to describe a passage or phrase that connects two sections or topics.

sentences.german: Der Moderator brauchte eine gute Überleitung zum nächsten Thema.
sentences.english: The presenter needed a good transition to the next topic.

sentences.german: Die Überleitung zwischen den beiden Musikstücken war sehr elegant.
sentences.english: The transition between the two pieces of music was very elegant.
